rules: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for headings to enforce the premium, technical look.
Overlines and table column headers MUST be uppercase, tiny text (text-xs), and have wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Use JetBrains Mono for all numeric data: ticker symbols, prices, price changes, card grades, and stats to give a stock-market feel.
Headings should use font-bold or font-black to contrast against the data-dense body.

surface: Cards: Go cardless where possible. When cards are needed, use Flat Solid #121214 with a crisp 1px border (#ffffff/10 or #1E1E24). DO NOT use soft drop shadows. Use inner borders or 1px subtle glow for focus states.

Headers/Nav: Crystal Glassmorphism. Background must be black with 60%-80% opacity (bg-black/80), heavy blur (backdrop-blur-xl), and a 1px delicate bottom border (border-white/10). NEVER use 100% transparency.
AI Elements (Research Terminal): Utilize the 'Tracing Beam' or a glowing cyan border (00E5FF) to highlight AI-generated insights, valuations, or the hold projector.
textures: Apply a subtle static noise/grain overlay across the app background (fixed, pointer-events-none, opacity ~2%) to eliminate digital flatness and create a tactile, premium finish.
components: Buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular buttons with 1px borders. Primary actions should use #007AFF or #00E5FF with high-contrast text.
Badges: Use JetBrains Mono inside minimalist pill badges for card grades (e.g., PSA 10, BGS 9.5).
Tables: High-density rows, border-b border-border/40, right-align numeric data, use up/down Phosphor arrows in success/destructive colors for price changes.

grids_and_layouts.dashboard: MODE B: High Density Grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col grids. Gaps should be tight (gap-4 or gap-6) to pack data efficiently.
grids_and_layouts.spacing: Inside containers: Use p-4 to p-6. Between sections: Use generous spacing (py-8 or py-12).
grids_and_layouts.structure: Mobile-first responsive. Override default stretch with align-items: start where necessary. Elements within a dashboard row must stretch to equal height (h-full on children).

rules: Hover states: Lighter background, border color highlight, text color shift. Must explicitly set text color on hover.
Transitions: Use specific transition properties (e.g., transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out), NOT 'transition-all'.
Data Loading: Use skeleton loaders with a sleek, dark-grey shimmer. Avoid spinning loaders unless inside a button.
AI Processing: Use 'scanning line' or 'typing effect' for AI valuations/research to feel computational.
Minimum 4.5:1 contrast for text. Gray body text must be at least #A1A1AA against #0A0A0C.
DO NOT rely solely on Success (Emerald) and Destructive (Red) colors. Always pair them with directional arrows or +/- symbols.
Interactive elements must have distinct focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00E5FF]).
Include aria-hidden='true' for decorative elements and SVGs.

3d_libraries.charts: Recharts. Mandatory for stock-like charts (line, area, candlesticks if possible, bar). Customize tooltips with Glassmorphism (bg-black/90, backdrop-blur, border-white/10, text-white).
3d_libraries.particles: TSParticles (Optional). Can be used lightly in the AI Research Terminal header for a 'neural net' or 'data point' aesthetic.

image_urls.category: Marketplace generic placeholder / Card stack visual

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Strictly adhere to the dark theme (#0A0A0C). NEVER introduce random white backgrounds or generic light mode elements. The platform must feel like an elite dark fintech terminal.
Do not center align the app container text (avoid `.App { text-align: center; }`). Keep text left-aligned for data readability.
Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Phosphor icons are mandatory for the data-dense, technical look. NEVER use emojis.
Import Google Fonts: 'Chivo', 'Inter', and 'JetBrains Mono'. Configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Create depth through layered z-index hierarchy and 1px borders, rather than muddy drop shadows.
Never use complete transparent backgrounds for headers, overlays, or sticky elements. Always use bg-black/60 (or darker) with backdrop-blur.
Every interactive element needs a micro-animation (hover, focus, active). Apply transitions specifically (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform). DO NOT use `transition: all`.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid="buy-card-button"`).
Use `sonner` for toast notifications. Ensure the toast styling matches the dark fintech aesthetic (black bg, 1px border).
When using Shadcn UI, aggressively customize the CSS to remove the default 'Vercel look' and replace it with our sharp, high-contrast, stock-market styling.
For the AI Research Terminal and Analytics pages, use Shadcn/Recharts for data visualization. Charts must use the specific #007AFF, #00E5FF, #34C759, and #FF3B30 colors for data points.
NEVER guess missing parameters in tool calls. DO NOT use placeholders like 'John Doe' without styling them contextually as realistic data.
instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON. Setup the Tailwind config with these colors and fonts. Build the layout with the Sidebar/Navbar. Implement the Marketplace, Portfolio, Analytics, and AI Research pages using the High-Density Grid layout. Use Recharts for all graphs, styled to look like a Bloomberg terminal.
